summary.short_summary: This chapter introduces the main ideas of Mechanical Properties of Solids in physics.
summary.detailed_summary: This chapter for Class 11 physics explains the core concepts of Mechanical Properties of Solids. It is intended as a structured study summary for CBSE learners.
